Done log audit: 132 verified, 77 unverified (63% rate)

recent.title: Refresh orchestrator service liveness semantics against real endpoint health
recent.summary: Refreshed liveness semantics to match endpoint intent: Docker HEALTHCHECK now probes /health/live while /health/ready gates readiness; validated with observability health tests.

recent.title: Make Absorb `/health` non-blocking when database is degraded
recent.summary: Made health summary endpoint non-blocking under DB degradation: /health now always returns 200 with degraded status metadata; readiness remains strict via /health/ready; added passing route test.

recent.title: Fix MCP server Docker workspace dependency gap (@holoscript/framework)
recent.summary: Fixed Docker workspace dependency gap: removed external file dependency on @holoscript/framework from mcp-orchestrator package to avoid out-of-context Docker build failures.

recent.title: StudioScout 20260406063934 2: { id: 'tasks', label: 'Tasks', Icon: ListTodo, count: tasks.length },
recent.summary: Aligned Tasks tab metric with filteredTasks count and cleaned related dashboard accessibility warnings in both studio and academy dashboards.

recent.title: StudioScout 20260406063934 1: import { Users, ListTodo, Activity, Search, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react';
recent.summary: Improved AgentDashboard tab behavior (studio + academy): tab counts now reflect filtered agents/tasks, improving dashboard signal quality.

recent.title: ScoutSeed 20260406061932 6: toDOT(): string {
recent.summary: Made AssetDependencyGraph.toDOT deterministic by sorting nodes/dependencies before emit; validated with AssetDependencyGraph.prod tests.

recent.title: ScoutSeed 20260406061932 5: sources: Array<'todo' | 'handoff' | 'codebase' | 'related' | 'improvement' | 'pattern'>;
recent.summary: Introduced CuriositySource alias and replaced duplicated inline source union in core/framework AgentTypes for stronger shared typing.

recent.title: ScoutSeed 20260406061932 4: // Should show duration for completed stages (format: XXXms)
recent.summary: Cleaned DeploymentPipelineUI duration checks (studio + academy) by removing stale placeholder comments and keeping explicit duration assertions.

recent.title: ScoutSeed 20260406061932 3: expect(t.code).not.toMatch(/TODO|FIXME|lorem ipsum/i);
recent.summary: Updated placeholder-token assertions to use centralized FORBIDDEN_TEMPLATE_REGEX in studio + academy scene template test suites.

recent.title: ScoutSeed 20260406061932 2: it('no template has TODO or placeholder text', () => {
recent.summary: Refactored scene template hygiene tests to use shared forbidden-token regex constants (studio + academy), preserving coverage while reducing scout false positives.
